content: PR 364 is now merged: https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/364 . I reviewed it as the primary structural convergence slice and, while I was landing it, GitHub reported another integrator had already merged it first. That puts the user-facing row and column controls plus structural rewrite/history path onto run/google/main.
I checked live GitHub state just now. PR 364 is already merged: https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/364. There is nothing left for me to review or land on that branch this round.

I took formal review ownership on PR 364. The full app test suite passed in your worktree, the live browser snapshot showed discoverable `+ Row`, `- Row`, `+ Col`, and `- Col` controls, and I replayed a real toolbar row-insert action with no console errors. GitHub now reports PR 364 as merged: https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/364.
